tool.name: browser_action
tool.description: Browser automation via Playwright. Actions: launch (start browser), goto (navigate), click (x,y), type (text input), scroll_down/scroll_up, back/forward, new_tab/switch_tab/close_tab/list_tabs, wait (seconds), execute_js (run JS), double_click/hover/press_key, save_pdf, get_console_logs, view_source, close (shutdown).

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: Exact action name. Valid: launch, goto, click, type, scroll_down, scroll_up, back, forward, new_tab, switch_tab, close_tab, list_tabs, wait, execute_js, double_click, hover, press_key, save_pdf, get_console_logs, view_source, close.

parameter.name: text
parameter.description: Required for type. Text to input.

parameter.name: tab_id
parameter.description: Tab to operate on. Use tab ID from launch result.

parameter.name: js_code
parameter.description: Required for execute_js. JavaScript code to run.

parameter.name: duration
parameter.description: Required for wait. Seconds to wait.

parameter.name: key
parameter.description: Required for press_key. Key name (Enter, Escape, etc).

parameter.name: file_path
parameter.description: Required for save_pdf. Output file path.

parameter.name: clear
parameter.description: For get_console_logs: clear after reading. Default false.

returns.description: success, screenshot, url, title, tab_id, message, error.
